nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Albertine Rift montane forests
nodes.summary: Albertine Rift montane forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联44种鸟类，包括Barred long-tailed cuckoo、白枕鸽、Albertine owlet等44种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Regal sunbird
nodes.summary: Regal sunbird（Regal sunbird，学名 Cinnyris regius），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联1个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛、山地森林。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is native to the Albertine Rift montane forests

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The regal sunbird's range spans the entire Albertine Rift montane forests (from Uganda to Tanzania), where it occurs between above sea level. Its habitat includes evergreen mountain forest, mixed forest, secondary growth forest, scrubland and bamboo

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The regal sunbird's range spans the entire Albertine Rift montane forests (from Uganda to Tanzania), where it occurs between above sea level. Its habitat includes evergreen mountain forest, mixed forest, secondary growth forest, scrubland and bamboo
